title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Luffy, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Jinbe as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Help me!! It's cold!! I'll become a demon!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Close the doors leading up to the other towers!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Everyone on this floor is screwed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is my greatest invention... the "Expite bullet"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: How dare you hurt my subordi- nates!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The way that gorilla spawned is way too freaky!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I WON'T LET YOU PAST HERE!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: way to run your mouth!! In that case...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The right way to spawn a gorilla!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Woah!! There are so many behind us too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Alright!! I'll get rid of them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How many times do I have to tell you! Save your stamina for the fight with Kaido!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With just you, it'd take some time to take care of all these guys, won't it!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shut up!! I'll take care of it in 10 seconds, you got a pro- blem with that!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I do it with you, it will only take 3!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I thought you'd be around here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm going to escort you both to the rooftop!! Make sure to conserve your strength!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are you butting in all of a sudden! I was the one who brought Luffy up all this way!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our Samurai Allies should have already headed up. Let's head there...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you already have a complete grasp of the state of the battlefield, huh!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen up! If you let your guard down, Luffy will jump into any fight he sees.

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 46 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
